# KIMORI Residences

> KIMORI (木森) is a 418-unit freehold condominium perched on the highest peak of Bukit Serdang, Seri Kembangan, Selangor, Malaysia. Developed by Premierex Development Sdn Bhd, it is shaped by Japanese principles of balance, light, and lasting craft — 28 residential storeys with 34 curated facilities and unblocked views of the KLCC skyline.

## Key Facts

- **Developer:** Premierex Development Sdn Bhd
- **Tenure:** Freehold
- **Total Units:** 418 (Phase 1)
- **Storeys:** 28 residential levels
- **Unit facing:** All units North–South
- **Carparks:** Minimum 2 per unit
- **Facilities:** 34 curated amenities
- **Design philosophy:** Japanese-inspired — 木森 (kimori = tree + forest)

## Unit Types

| Type | Built-up | Bedrooms | Bathrooms | Carparks | View |
|------|----------|----------|-----------|----------|------|
| A    | 1,095 sq ft | 4+1 | 2 | 2 | KLCC & Facilities |
| B    | 857 sq ft   | 3   | 2 | 2 | Dual North–South  |

## Signature Facilities

- 25-metre infinity pool, north-facing, framing the KLCC skyline
- Rooftop garden: pines, par fitness course, reading lawn, Putrajaya-to-Merdeka-118 views
- Sunken jacuzzi garden screened by timber lattice, embedded ground lamps
- Grand drop-off roundabout with a preserved mature canopy tree
- 34 total facilities across podium and rooftop levels

## Location

- **Address:** Jalan BS 1/2, Bukit Serdang, 43300 Seri Kembangan, Selangor, Malaysia
- **Coordinates:** 3.0138° N, 101.7069° E
- **MRT:** 3 km to UPM Station (Putrajaya Line) — direct to KL Sentral, KLCC, Putrajaya
- **Hospitals:** 5 within 10 km
- **Shopping malls:** 8+ nearby
- **Setting:** Highest peak of Bukit Serdang — elevated above city noise and flood plains

## Developer

Premierex Development Sdn Bhd is a Malaysian property developer with 30+ years of combined industry experience, rooted in construction through affiliate Magnibiz Sdn Bhd. Previous completed project: Kondominium Timur Perdana (350 units, fully occupied, delivered 2022).

## Contact & Experience

- **Website:** https://kimori.my
- **Phone:** +60 3-XXXX XXXX
- **360° Virtual Tour:** https://www.7degree.com.my/360VR/Kimori/
- **Sales Gallery:** Jalan BS 1/2, Bukit Serdang, Seri Kembangan, Selangor
